entries.parse: GRANGE beheaded (first G removed) gives RANGE, a row of hills.

entries.clue: Cars wrecked, leaving a lasting mark (4)
entries.parse: (CARS)* = SCAR; a lasting mark.

entries.clue: Crate smashed leaves a faint mark (5)
entries.parse: Anagram of CRATE (indicated by 'smashed') gives TRACE, a faint mark.
Double definition: red (embarrassed, as in going red), and a Red (revolutionary/communist).

entries.clue: Sage perhaps belonging to her, the bishop (4)
entries.parse: HER + B (bishop, in chess) = HERB; sage is a herb, so 'perhaps' flags the definition by example.
DIAPER reversed = REPAID, settled a debt.
